heading: Relationship with State law
label: 6313 Relationship with State law
text: Nothing in this chapter shall prohibit a State from adopting or enforcing supplemental or more stringent laws or regulations not inconsistent with this chapter, or criminal, civil, or administrative fines for violations of such laws or regulations.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1997section 23 of Pub. L. 104–272section 6301 of this title
